HELP:
Pan & Tilt
                Joystick L/R/U/D
Zoom
                Twist joystick
Manual Focus
                Hat
                up: focus far 
                down: focus near 
                left/right: autofocus
Select Camera
                Top buttons: 1-4
                long press: 5-8
                puts selected camera in Preview
Fade Preview to Program 
                Front trigger
White Balance
                Side trigger
                short press: one push white balance 
                long press: auto white balance
Presets 1-6
                Base buttons
                short press: recall
                long press: set
Video Fade
                Transition Bar
